## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Checklist

- [ ] I ran `bun run typecheck`
- [ ] I ran `bun run build`
- [ ] I ran `bun test`
- [ ] I updated docs/tests as needed
- [ ] I validated security impact (no secrets, no private host leaks)

## Release Notes

- [ ] `feature`
- [ ] `fix`
- [ ] `docs`
- [ ] `chore`
- [ ] `skip-changelog`
